_source: CEWA Approved Technology List — update this file when the sheet changes

chatgpt.notes: Under no circumstances should personal or sensitive information be uploaded. Not for use by students under 13.

gemini.notes: Listed as Google Bard. Privacy policy states not intended for use by anyone under 18 — staff only. Contact CEWA service desk to enable SSO.

notebooklm.notes: Not approved for CEWA use. Use Microsoft OneNote (stored within CEWA tenant) as an alternative. Contact CIO for more information.

canva-ai.notes: Use Canva for Education and sign in with CEWA credentials. Dream Lab (AI image generation) not for use by students under 13.

microsoft-copilot.notes: Microsoft 365 Copilot is in pilot for 100 CEWA staff. Must use logged-in version for Enterprise Data Protection. Copilot Chat is fully approved.

adobe-firefly.notes: Children under 13 may use under teacher supervision with Creative Cloud. Never upload student photos or photos with personal/sensitive information.

chalkie-ai.notes: Use Google SSO for authentication. Do not upload student personal or sensitive information. Must abide by CEWA's Generative AI Framework.

microsoft-reading-coach.notes: CEWA approved. Part of the Microsoft 365 Education suite.

quillbot.notes: May only use Team Plan — schools may not use the free version.

seqta-ai-assist.notes: Check accuracy of AI-generated content. Use professional judgement on appropriateness for the intended lesson.

wayground.notes: Use CEWA SSO. Do not use personal or sensitive information — data stored offshore in the USA.

turnitin.notes: Be mindful of student information in submitted work. Includes Turnitin Draft Coach.

nurture-ai.notes: CEWA pilot Jan–Jun 2025 for pilot schools only. Check with your school's digital team for current status.

deepseek.notes: Not approved for CEWA use as per prime memo 7th February 2025.

capcut.notes: High risk — significant privacy, biometric and intellectual property concerns particularly regarding student use.

khanmigo.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

diffit.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

curipod.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

twee.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

magicschool.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

claude.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

perplexity.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

gamma.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

schoolai.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

eduaide.notes: Not on CEWA approved technology list.

suno.notes: Does not meet CEWA privacy or security requirements. Invasive and excessive data collection practices.
